title: Reply Method, Spel Class
description: Returns the reply from the last command executed.
notes:
The Reply method is used to retrieve data returned by a command executed with ExecuteCommand. If there is a carriage return and line feed at the end of the reply, they are removed.

Data Type

String
see_also:
ErrorMessage

ErrorNumber

Reply Example

ReDim tokens(0) As String

m_spel.ExecSPELCmd "PRINT var1, var2$, var3"

m_spel.ParseString m_spel.Reply, tokens(), " "

var1 = Val(tokens(0))

var2 = Trim$(tokens(1))

var3 = Val(tokens(2))
examples:
